.idea/compiler.xml.general_idea: Update IntelliJ IDEA compiler configuration to reflect the current Maven module names.

.idea/misc.xml.general_idea: Update IntelliJ IDEA project configuration to target Java 21 instead of Java 24.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code using Java 21 features (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads) will fail to compile if the compiler target remains at 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-compiler-plugin with <release>21</release> to ensure bytecode compatibility with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit release configuration, the compiler might not enforce Java 21 API restrictions or might produce incompatible bytecode depending on the default JDK behavior.
